_note: No real runner-measured baseline exists yet. This sandbox environment is not the target GitHub Actions ubuntu runner (issue #116 explicitly requires a runner-captured baseline, distinct from the local-machine baselines in scripts/turbo-speed/baselines/), so this PR ships the gate's mechanics with an empty 'metrics' map rather than fabricated numbers. tools/perf_gate/compare.py treats an empty 'metrics' map as bootstrap mode: it runs (and reports) but does not fail the build. The first follow-up CI run on main should execute `python3 -m tools.perf_gate.bootstrap_baseline` and commit the result in a small, reviewable follow-up PR -- see docs/performance.md.
